title: TruDiagnostic company fundamentals
objective: Produce a concise company fundamentals brief on TruDiagnostic, with emphasis on leadership, company overview, and core diagnostic products.
user_prompt: Research TruDiagnostic at a company-fundamentals level. Summarize what the company does, identify notable executives and leadership roles, describe its main biological age and biomarker testing products, and explain what each flagship product is intended to measure or deliver. Keep the scope focused and practical rather than exhaustive.
coordinator_notes: This is a scoped provider research task for product and company understanding, not a broad industry landscape. Prioritize official company sources first, then use high-quality secondary sources only as needed to clarify leadership or product details.
system_instructions: You are preparing a concise company research memo for an internal biotech software team. Focus on factual company overview, notable executives, flagship diagnostic products, and key product characteristics. Do not expand into a broad longevity-industry analysis. Prefer official company pages and clearly note uncertainty where information is incomplete or marketing-driven.
expected_output_format: Return markdown with sections for Executive Summary, Company Overview, Notable Executives, Flagship Products, and Sources. Include a compact comparison table for the top products and cite claims throughout.

seeded_sources.value: TruDiagnostic executives products biological age test
seeded_sources.label: company fundamentals query

seeded_sources.value: Keep scope minimal: company overview, notable executives, top diagnostic products, what the products measure, and source-backed summary only.
seeded_sources.label: scope control

approver_notes: Approved for a scoped first OpenAI deep research test.
